0:
This reporter from the <Emphasis>Mythril Eye</Emphasis> seems eager to ask you a question.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

This reporter from the <Emphasis>Mythril Eye</Emphasis> seems eager to ask you a question.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
A reporter from the <Emphasis>Mythril Eye</Emphasis> is stopping all passersby to take a survey about this year's Little Ladies' Day celebration, and that includes you. As he tells it, Ul'dah is abuzz with talk of the festivities planned, the main event being a special performance by the Songbirds. After taking note of your thoughts on the matter, he encourages you to speak with the royal seneschal over on Emerald Avenue to learn more.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

A reporter from the <Emphasis>Mythril Eye</Emphasis> is stopping all passersby to take a survey about this year's Little Ladies' Day celebration, and that includes you. As he tells it, Ul'dah is abuzz with talk of the festivities planned, the main event being a special performance by the Songbirds. After taking note of your thoughts on the matter, he encourages you to speak with the royal seneschal over on Emerald Avenue to learn more.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

4:
With your costume and lights in hand, all you need do now is wait for the show to begin. Until then, the royal seneschal offers to hold onto your newly acquired raiments and instructs you to speak with the royal handmaiden to better prepare for the performance. 

※To participate in the FATE, you must first speak with the royal handmaiden on Emerald Avenue and receive the “Face in the Crowd” status effect.
